admissible_claims.claim: A label record with label_value='gore' exists on at://did:plc:gqwovmktdbmtjbdlab4344tn/app.bsky.feed.post/3lqcpwai5xv2h, issued by moderation.bsky.app at 2026-06-05T17:38:57.325732Z.
The published policy at the pinned artifact maps the label_value to action: <unspecified action>, under the documented render_context.
Under the named consumer with the stated render_context, the documented policy would apply the documented action to this target.
admissible_claims.qualifier: Conditional derivation over the documented rule; not over actual render execution.

inadmissible_claims.why_inadmissible: Laundering: collapses producer/consumer/enforcer distinction. label_observed alone does not derive render_observed. The no-laundering theorem forbids this derivation.

inadmissible_claims.claim_form: This post was rendered with action X for user U at time T
inadmissible_claims.why_inadmissible: Requires RenderObservation, which is absent. Cannot be derived from LabelObservation + PolicyDocumentation alone.

inadmissible_claims.claim_form: All renders of this post produce the documented action
inadmissible_claims.why_inadmissible: Population claim. Policy may be configurable; viewer may override; live client may run a different policy version. Requires probe campaign with defined sampling frame, not derivation from this evidence bundle.
